concerns.text: The preamble contains a raw NOTE block with action item hashes (e.g., [a15e9baee511]) that should be integrated into the main text or removed. These look like internal tracking artifacts, not part of the final manuscript.
The abstract contains an unresolved claim marker: '[UNRESOLVED-CLAIM: c_433ebbae — status=not_enough_info]'. This must be resolved with actual data or rephrased as a hypothesis before publication.

The abstract URL is malformed: 'https://github.com/opendatalab/CiteVQA (code will be made publicly available upon publication) (code archived and provided as supplementary material)'. The URL is broken by text, and the parentheticals are redundant. Fix the link and clean the phrasing.
Section 3.1 (Document Collection) contains another unresolved claim marker: '[UNRESOLVED-CLAIM: c_aa9463b7 — status=not_enough_info]'. This breaks the narrative flow and must be addressed.

The 'Remark' paragraph in Section 3.3 references Appendices that are not yet defined or populated in the provided source. Ensure all cross-references (e.g., 'Appendix~\ref{Appendix: Details of Expert Evaluation}') resolve correctly in the final build.

The 'Limitations' section label is misspelled in the label definition: '\label{appendix: Limitations}' (lowercase 'a' in appendix, inconsistent with other labels like '\label{Appendix: ...}'). This may cause broken cross-references.
The 'Prompt for Annotation Evluation' in Appendix 4.1 has a typo in the title: 'Evluation' instead of 'Evaluation'. Fix the typo in the promptbox title.
The 'Prompt for Evaluating Answer Correctness' in Appendix 4.2 contains a typo in the scoring criteria: 'prefect' instead of 'perfect' in the description for score 5.

The 'Limitations' section label in the text body is inconsistent: '\label{appenidx: Limitations}' (typo 'appenidx') vs '\label{appendix: Limitations}' in the previous file. Standardize all appendix labels to '\label{Appendix: ...}'.

The 'Reproducibility Appendix' section is missing from the main text body. The plan (T011) requires a dedicated section for reproducibility details, but the provided LaTeX source jumps from 'Limitations' to the end. Add the required section.
